"Description":" Credential submission has been recorded against a Web decoy for a non admin or administrator or a root user. This could mean that an attacker is testing the validity of credentials that may have been obtained via phishing / external sources / Credential Access techniques. If multiple credentials are submitted", it could indicate brute force attempt. Adversaries may steal the credentials of a specific user account using Credential Access techniques or capture credentials earlier in their reconnaissance process through social engineering for means of gaining Initial Access. Compromised credentials may also grant an adversary increased privilege to specific systems or access to restricted areas of the network.
